name: Carrot Cake with Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a loaf pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
To prepare batter, combine granulated sugar, flour, baking soda, cinnamon, salt, and shredded carrots in a mixing bowl.
In another mixing bowl, combine crushed pineapple, 2 tablespoons vanilla extract, oil, and egg whites.
Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened. The mixture will be thick.
Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
Bake for 1 hour.
Meanwhile, to prepare topping, combine cream cheese, powdered sugar, and remaining vanilla extract in a small mixing bowl.
Blend until smooth.
Spread over cooled cake.
WARNING: Bake in a shallow baking pan (11x7 inches) rather than a loaf pan.
